title: alyssum stylare
intro: Alyssum stylare, also known as Sweet Alyssum, is a low-growing, flowering perennial plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum stylare include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Alyssum stylare can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
